title: crepidium repens
intro: Crepidium repens, also known as the creeping crepidium, is a type of terrestrial orchid found in tropical and subtropical regions, characterized by its small size and delicate white flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepidium repens are said to include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
